app.name: Kitbag
app.one_sentence_promise: A packing list that learns from your own trip history instead of handing you a generic template.
app.target_user: Frequent travelers who over- or under-pack and want a personal system rather than a one-size-fits-all checklist.
app.painful_moment: Staring at a blank generic packing checklist the night before a trip and forgetting the same things every time.
app.why_different: Builds lists from your own packing/usage history captured via a quick post-trip review, and uses bundled offline climate-normal data by month and region instead of a live weather feed.
app.why_users_pay: Unlimited trip history, deeper post-trip analytics, list export/share to travel companions, premium curated templates for niche trip types.
app.subscription_model: Free: 3 trips of history, basic list. Paid: unlimited history/analytics/premium templates.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: Entirely on-device trip and packing history, with a bundled offline climate-normal reference table.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Optional cloud backup/sync of trip history; potential live-weather enhancement layered on later, never required.
core_workflows: Post-trip review of what went unused
Browse personal packing insights over time
ios_native_features: Widgets for days-until-trip and packing progress
Live Activities for an active packing session
App Intents/Siri to add items by voice
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: On-device weighting of list suggestions from personal packing history; optional on-device LLM phrasing of suggestions.
app.design_direction: Crisp, modern travel-editorial look with destination-photo headers — a boutique travel planner, not a generic checklist app.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a boutique travel-editorial packing app: a destination-photo-driven trip header, a clean smart-checklist view, and a lightweight post-trip review screen that feels quick, not like homework.
app.app_store_positioning: The packing list that actually learns from you — not a generic template.
key_risks: First trip has no history to learn from, so v1 must be useful with zero history via smart defaults
Climate-normal data must be clearly labeled as historical averages, not a forecast
app.invalidation_criteria: If post-trip review completion stays very low, the self-improving loop can't function and the app should be redesigned around a faster review prompt.
app.v1_build_scope: Trip creation, smart default list by type/region, checklist UI, post-trip review, personal insights.
